payload.rationale: The mutex must be live for EXTEND to succeed
The mutex live status is not explicitly tracked in the source code

payload.label: mutex_owner
payload.rationale: The mutex owner role is crucial for understanding the lock's status
This test checks that EXTEND fails after expiry
This test checks that EXTEND fails when the lock is taken by another process
